author: hbicofbiology
install_msg: Thanks for installing RaiseCat! Use `[p]cat adopt` to adopt your server's cat!
name: RaiseCat
short: Raise a shared server cat together!
description: A collaborative cat-raising cog where the entire server works together to raise a cat from kitten to elder. Feed, play, groom, heal, and teach tricks to your server's shared cat!
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs and interaction counts for the leaderboard. No personal data beyond Discord user IDs is stored.
